description: Plugin-distributed hooks for content-and-growth-marketing. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable marketing anti-patterns (a content brief with no audience/CTA, an email flow that's an unsegmented blast or has no trigger, copy optimizing for vanity opens, a deliverability doc missing SPF/DKIM/DMARC). Set MARKETING_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
